zh.Bradford Peverell, Dorset, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭多瑟特布拉德福德 培維勒爾
zh.lifeSummary: Henry Butterworth於1446年出生在英國英格蘭戴文。他於1471年與Margaret Ridge在英國英格蘭多瑟特布拉德福德 培維勒爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Butterworth于1446年出生在英国英格兰戴文。他于1471年与Margaret Ridge在英国英格兰多瑟特布拉德福德 培維勒爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Butterworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Butterworth in Lancashire (near Rochdale). Named with Old English butere ‘butter’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Butterworth was born in 1446, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. He married Margaret Ridge in 1471, in Bradford Peverell, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Butterworth est né en 1446, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Margaret Ridge en 1471, à Bradford Peverell, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ja.Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: Henry Butterworthは1446年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた。1471年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブラドフォード ペバーエルでMargaret Ridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Butterworth(은)는 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났다. 그는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브래드퍼드 p에버에서 Margaret Ridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Butterworth родился в 1446 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ridge в 1471 г. в местности брадфорд пивирэлл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.
